result.summary: The page is mostly rendered correctly, but a few elements look visually broken or poorly placed: the bottom navigation appears to be missing the Sports icon, and the scroll prompt overlaps the small legal text, making that area hard to read.

issues.description: The bottom navigation shows a plain 'SPORTS' label without an accompanying icon, unlike the other items.
issues.suggestion: Restore the Sports icon or adjust the nav design so the item matches the rest of the footer menu.

issues.description: The 'SCROLL DOWN' overlay sits on top of the fine-print disclaimer text near the bottom of the page.
issues.suggestion: Move the scroll prompt lower or hide it once it overlaps the legal copy so the disclaimer remains readable.

issues.description: The legal disclaimer text is extremely small and compressed, making it difficult to read.
issues.suggestion: Increase the font size and spacing of the disclaimer, or present it in a dedicated readable section.
